            # time within segment = remaining / rate_s

                    		
                  

                  

                    305
                    !
                    
                      
            dt <- remaining / rates[s]

                    		
                  

                  

                    306
                    !
                    
                      
            t[i] <- seg_starts[s] + dt

                    		
                  

                  

                    307
                    !
                    
                      
            break

                    		
                  

                  

                    308
                    
                    
                      
         } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    309
                    
                    
                      
            # Consume full segment hazard and move to next

                    		
                  

                  

                    310
                    !
                    
                      
            remaining <- remaining - h_full

                    		
                  

                  

                    311
                    
                    
                      
         }

                    		
                  

                  

                    312
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    313
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    314
                    !
                    
                      
   t

                    		
                  

                  

                    315
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    316
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    317
                    
                    
                      
# In .sim_time(), accept both "ph_pwexp" and "cox_pwexp" (internal alias)

                    		
                  

                  

                    318
                    
                    
                      
.sim_time <- function(model, baseline, eta, n) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    319
                    !
                    
                      
   if (model == "aft_lognormal") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    320
                    !
                    
                      
      mu <- baseline$mu; sigma <- baseline$sigma

                    		
                  

                  

                    321
                    !
                    
                      
      return( exp(mu + eta + stats::rnorm(n, 0, sigma)) )

                    		
                  

                  

                    322
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    323
                    !
                    
                      
   if (model == "aft_weibull") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    324
                    !
                    
                      
      k <- baseline$shape; lam <- baseline$scale

                    		
                  

                  

                    325
                    !
                    
                      
      u <- stats::runif(n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    326
                    !
                    
                      
      return( lam * exp(eta) * (-log(1 - u))^(1/k) )

                    		
                  

                  

                    327
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    328
                    !
                    
                      
   if (model == "aft_loglogistic") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    329
                    !
                    
                      
      k <- baseline$shape; lam <- baseline$scale

                    		
                  

                  

                    330
                    !
                    
                      
      u <- stats::runif(n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    331
                    !
                    
                      
      return( lam * exp(eta) * (u/(1-u))^(1/k) )

                    		
                  

                  

                    332
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    333
                    !
                    
                      
   if (model == "ph_exponential") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    334
                    !
                    
                      
      lam0 <- baseline$rate

                    		
                  

                  

                    335
                    !
                    
                      
      return( stats::rexp(n, rate = lam0 * exp(eta)) )

                    		
                  

                  

                    336
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    337
                    !
                    
                      
   if (model == "ph_weibull") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    338
                    !
                    
                      
      k <- baseline$shape; lam <- baseline$scale

                    		
                  

                  

                    339
                    !
                    
                      
      u <- stats::runif(n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    340
                    !
                    
                      
      return( lam * (-log(u) / exp(eta))^(1/k) )

                    		
                  

                  

                    341
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    342
                    !
                    
                      
   if (model %in% c("ph_pwexp", "cox_pwexp")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    343
                    !
                    
                      
      rates <- baseline$rates

                    		
                  

                  

                    344
                    !
                    
                      
      cuts  <- baseline$cuts %||% numeric(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    345
                    !
                    
                      
      return( .sim_pwexp(rates, cuts, lp = eta) )

                    		
                  

                  

                    346
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    347
                    !
                    
                      
   stop("Unsupported model: ", model)

                    		
                  

                  

                    348
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    349
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    350
                    
                    
                      
# ---------- Censoring ----------

                    		
                  

                  

                    351
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    352
                    
                    
                      
.achieved_cens_exp <- function(T_event, rate, admin_time = Inf) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    353
                    !
                    
                      
  n <- length(T_event)

                    		
                  

                  

                    354
                    !
                    
                      
  admin <- if (is.null(admin_time) || !is.finite(admin_time)) Inf else admin_time

                    		
                  

                  

                    355
                    !
                    
                      
  if (is.na(rate) || rate <= 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    356
                    !
                    
                      
    C_rand <- rep(Inf, n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    357
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    358
                    !
                    
                      
    C_rand <- stats::rexp(n, rate = rate)

                    		
                  

                  

                    359
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    360
                    !
                    
                      
  C <- pmin(C_rand, admin)

                    		
                  

                  

                    361
                    !
                    
                      
  status <- as.integer(T_event <= C)

                    		
                  

                  

                    362
                    !
                    
                      
  mean(status == 0, na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    363
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    364
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    365
                    
                    
                      
.solve_rate_for_target <- function(T_event, target, admin_time = Inf, tol = 0.002) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    366
                    !
                    
                      
  admin <- if (is.null(admin_time) || !is.finite(admin_time)) Inf else admin_time

                    		
                  

                  

                    367
                    !
                    
                      
  target <- max(min(target, 0.999), 0.001)

                    		
                  

                  

                    368
                    !
                    
                      
  cmin <- mean(T_event > admin, na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    369
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!is.finite(cmin) || is.na(cmin)) cmin <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    370
                    !
                    
                      
  if (cmin >= target - tol) return(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    371
                    !
                    
                      
  f <- function(rate) .achieved_cens_exp(T_event, rate, admin) - target

                    		
                  

                  

                    372
                    !
                    
                      
  lo <- 1e-12; hi <- 0.1

                    		
                  

                  

                    373
                    !
                    
                      
  for (k in 1:60) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    374
                    !
                    
                      
    val <- f(hi)

                    		
                  

                  

                    375
                    !
                    
                      
    if (is.finite(val) && val >= 0) break

                    		
                  

                  

                    376
                    !
                    
                      
    hi <- hi * 2

                    		
                  

                  

                    377
                    !
                    
                      
    if (hi > 1e6) break

                    		
                  

                  

                    378
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    379
                    !
                    
                      
  val_hi <- f(hi)

                    		
                  

                  

                    380
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!is.finite(val_hi) || val_hi < 0) return(hi)

                    		
                  

                  

                    381
                    !
                    
                      
  stats::uniroot(function(r) f(r), c(lo, hi), tol = tol)$root

                    		
                  

                  

                    382
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    383
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    384
                    
                    
                      
#' Simulate a dataset from a validated recipe (list-only)

                    		
                  

                  

                    385
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    386
                    
                    
                      
#' @param recipe A validated recipe list (use \code{validate_recipe()}).

                    		
                  

                  

                    387
                    
                    
                      
#' @param seed Optional integer seed to override recipe$seed.

                    		
                  

                  

                    388
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A data.frame with columns \code{time}, \code{status}, \code{arm} (if treatment present),

                    		
                  

                  

                    389
                    
                    
                      
#'         plus covariates. Attribute \code{"achieved_censoring"} is attached.

                    		
                  

                  

                    390
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    391
                    
                    
                      
#' covs <- list(list(name="x", type="continuous", dist="normal", params=list(mean=0, sd=1)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    392
                    
                    
                      
#' rec <- recipe_quick_aft(120, "aft_lognormal",

                    		
                  

                  

                    393
                    
                    
                      
#'         baseline=list(mu=2.2, sigma=0.5), treat_effect=-0.2,

                    		
                  

                  

                    394
                    
                    
                      
#'         covariates=covs, target_censoring=0.25)

                    		
                  

                  

                    395
                    
                    
                      
#' dat <- simulate_from_recipe(rec, seed = 11)

                    		
                  

                  

                    396
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    397
                    
                    
                      
simulate_from_recipe <- function(recipe, seed = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    398
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!is.list(recipe)) stop("`recipe` must be a list (no YAML paths).")

                    		
                  

                  

                    399
                    !
                    
                      
  recipe <- validate_recipe(recipe)

                    		
                  

                  

                    400
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(seed)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    401
                    !
                    
                      
    old <- .Random.seed; on.exit({ if (exists("old")) .Random.seed <<- old }, add = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    402
                    !
                    
                      
    set.seed(seed)

                    		
                  

                  

                    403
                    !
                    
                      
  } else if (!is.null(recipe$seed)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    404
                    !
                    
                      
    old <- .Random.seed; on.exit({ if (exists("old")) .Random.seed <<- old }, add = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    405
                    !
                    
                      
    set.seed(recipe$seed)

                    		
                  

                  

                    406
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    407
                    !
                    
                      
  n <- recipe$n

                    		
                  

                  

                    408
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    409
                    
                    
                      
  # Covariates

                    		
                  

                  

                    410
                    !
                    
                      
  X <- gen_covariates(n, recipe$covariates)

                    		
                  

                  

                    411
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    412
                    
                    
                      
  # Treatment

                    		
                  

                  

                    413
                    !
                    
                      
  arm <- .assign_treatment(n, X, recipe$treatment %||% NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    414
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(arm)) X$arm <- arm

                    		
                  

                  

                    415
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    416
                    
                    
                      
  # Linear predictor + frailty

                    		
                  

                  

                    417
                    !
                    
                      
  eta <- .build_lp(recipe$event_time$effects, X, arm)

                    		
                  

                  

                    418
                    !
                    
                      
  eta <- .apply_frailty(eta, model = recipe$event_time$model,

                    		
                  

                  

                    419
                    !
                    
                      
                        frailty = recipe$event_time$frailty %||% NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    420
                    !
                    
                      
                        groups = X)

                    		
                  

                  

                    421
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    422
                    
                    
                      
  # Event times

                    		
                  

                  

                    423
                    !
                    
                      
  T_event <- .sim_time(recipe$event_time$model, recipe$event_time$baseline, eta, n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    424
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    425
                    
                    
                      
  # Censoring

                    		
                  

                  

                    426
                    !
                    
                      
  cz <- recipe$censoring

                    		
                  

                  

                    427
                    !
                    
                      
  admin <- cz$admin_time %||% Inf

                    		
                  

                  

                    428
                    !
                    
                      
  if (cz$mode == "target_overall") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    429
                    !
                    
                      
    rate <- .solve_rate_for_target(T_event, cz$target, admin_time = admin, tol = 0.002)

                    		
                  

                  

                    430
                    !
                    
                      
    C_rand <- if (rate <= 0) rep(Inf, n) else stats::rexp(n, rate = rate)

                    		
                  

                  

                    431
                    !
                    
                      
    C <- pmin(C_rand, admin)

                    		
                  

                  

                    432
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    433
                    !
                    
                      
    C <- rep(Inf, n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    434
                    !
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(cz$administrative$time)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    435
                    !
                    
                      
      C <- pmin(C, cz$administrative$time)

                    		
                  

                  

                    436
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    437
                    !
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(cz$random)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    438
                    !
                    
                      
      rd <- cz$random

                    		
                  

                  

                    439
                    !
                    
                      
      if (rd$dist == "exponential") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    440
                    !
                    
                      
        C <- pmin(C, stats::rexp(n, rate = rd$params$rate))

                    		
                  

                  

                    441
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    442
                    !
                    
                      
        stop("explicit random censoring supports dist='exponential' only for now.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    443
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    444
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    445
                    !
                    
                      
    if (!is.null(cz$dependent)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    446
                    !
                    
                      
      f <- cz$dependent$formula %||% NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    447
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(f)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    448
                    !
                    
                      
        mm <- stats::model.matrix(stats::as.formula(f), data = X)

                    		
                  

                  

                    449
                    !
                    
                      
        gamma <- cz$dependent$beta %||% rep(0, ncol(mm))

                    		
                  

                  

                    450
                    !
                    
                      
        if (length(gamma) != ncol(mm)) stop("censoring dependent beta length mismatch.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    451
                    !
                    
                      
        lp_c <- as.vector(mm %*% gamma)

                    		
                  

                  

                    452
                    !
                    
                      
        base <- cz$dependent$base %||% 0.02

                    		
                  

                  

                    453
                    !
                    
                      
        C <- pmin(C, stats::rexp(n, rate = base * exp(lp_c)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    454
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    455
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    456
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    457
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    458
                    !
                    
                      
  time <- pmin(T_event, C)

                    		
                  

                  

                    459
                    !
                    
                      
  status <- as.integer(T_event <= C)

                    		
                  

                  

                    460
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    461
                    !
                    
                      
  out <- data.frame(time = as.numeric(time), status = as.integer(status))

                    		
                  

                  

                    462
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(arm)) out$arm <- as.integer(arm)

                    		
                  

                  

                    463
                    !
                    
                      
  if (ncol(X)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    464
                    !
                    
                      
    if ("arm" %in% names(X)) X$arm <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    465
                    !
                    
                      
    out <- cbind(out, X)

                    		
                  

                  

                    466
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    467
                    !
                    
                      
  attr(out, "achieved_censoring") <- mean(out$status == 0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    468
                    !
                    
                      
  out

                    		
                  

                  

                    469
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    470
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    471
                    
                    
                      
#' Quick AFT recipe builder (list-only, no L/tau)

                    		
                  

                  

                    472
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    473
                    
                    
                      
#' @param n Sample size.

                    		
                  

                  

                    474
                    
                    
                      
#' @param model One of \code{"aft_lognormal"} or \code{"aft_weibull"}.

                    		
                  

                  

                    475
                    
                    
                      
#' @param baseline Baseline parameter list (see model).

                    		
                  

                  

                    476
                    
                    
                      
#' @param treat_effect Numeric treatment coefficient (on log-time scale).

                    		
                  

                  

                    477
                    
                    
                      
#' @param covariates Covariate definitions (list of defs).

                    		
                  

                  

                    478
                    
                    
                      
#' @param target_censoring Target overall censoring fraction (0-1).

                    		
                  

                  

                    479
                    
                    
                      
#' @param allocation Allocation ratio string (e.g., "1:1").

                    		
                  

                  

                    480
                    
                    
                      
#' @param seed Optional seed.

                    		
                  

                  

                    481
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A recipe list suitable for \code{\link{simulate_from_recipe}}.

                    		
                  

                  

                    482
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    483
                    
                    
                      
#' covs <- list(list(name="x", type="continuous", dist="normal", params=list(mean=0, sd=1)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    484
                    
                    
                      
#' r <- recipe_quick_aft(120, "aft_lognormal",

                    		
                  

                  

                    485
                    
                    
                      
#'        baseline=list(mu=2.3, sigma=0.5), treat_effect=-0.2,

                    		
                  

                  

                    486
                    
                    
                      
#'        covariates=covs, target_censoring=0.25, allocation="1:1")

                    		
                  

                  

                    487
                    
                    
                      
#' dat <- simulate_from_recipe(r, seed = 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    488
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    489
                    
                    
                      
recipe_quick_aft <- function(n, model = c("aft_lognormal","aft_weibull"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    490
                    
                    
                      
                             baseline, treat_effect, covariates,

                    		
                  

                  

                    491
                    
                    
                      
                             target_censoring = 0.25, allocation = "1:1",

                    		
                  

                  

                    492
                    
                    
                      
                             seed = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    493
                    !
                    
                      
  model <- match.arg(model)

                    		
                  

                  

                    494
                    !
                    
                      
  list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    495
                    !
                    
                      
    n = as.integer(n),

                    		
                  

                  

                    496
                    !
                    
                      
    covariates = list(defs = covariates),

                    		
                  

                  

                    497
                    !
                    
                      
    treatment = list(assignment = "randomization", allocation = allocation),

                    		
                  

                  

                    498
                    !
                    
                      
    event_time = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    499
                    !
                    
                      
      model = model,

                    		
                  

                  

                    500
                    !
                    
                      
      baseline = baseline,

                    		
                  

                  

                    501
                    !
                    
                      
      effects = list(intercept = 0, treatment = treat_effect, covariates = NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    502
                    
                    
                      
    ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    503
                    !
                    
                      
    censoring = list(mode = "target_overall", target = target_censoring, admin_time = Inf),

                    		
                  

                  

                    504
                    !
                    
                      
    seed = seed

                    		
                  

                  

                    505
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    506
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    507
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    508
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom stats model.matrix rnorm runif rexp rweibull rlnorm rgamma rbeta rt rbinom plogis uniroot

                    		
                  

                  

                    509
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom utils head tail

                    		
                  

                  

                    510
                    
                    
                      
NULL

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#' @title Linear IPCW RMST Model Power and Sample Size Calculation (Analytic)

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description An internal function for the Shiny app.

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
.estimate_linear_ipcw_params <- function(pilot_data, time_var, status_var, arm_var, linear_terms, L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    !
                    
                      
  cat("--- Estimating parameters from pilot data for analytic calculation... ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    !
                    
                      
  core_vars <- c(time_var, status_var, arm_var)

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    !
                    
                      
  all_vars <- c(core_vars, linear_terms)

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    !
                    
                      
  df <- pilot_data[stats::complete.cases(pilot_data[, all_vars]), ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    !
                    
                      
  n_pilot <- nrow(df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
  # Define model formulas

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    !
                    
                      
  factor_arm_str <- paste0("factor(", arm_var, ")")

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    !
                    
                      
  model_rhs <- paste(c(factor_arm_str, linear_terms), collapse = " + ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    !
                    
                      
  model_formula <- stats::as.formula(paste("Y_rmst ~", model_rhs))

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    !
                    
                      
  message("Model: Y_rmst ~ ", model_rhs)

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
  # Prepare data for IPCW

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    !
                    
                      
  df$Y_rmst <- pmin(df[[time_var]], L)

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    !
                    
                      
  df$is_censored <- df[[status_var]] == 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    !
                    
                      
  df$is_event <- df[[status_var]] == 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
  # Fit censoring model (Kaplan-Meier for G(t))

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    !
                    
                      
  cens_fit <- survival::survfit(survival::Surv(Y_rmst, is_censored) ~ 1, data = df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    !
                    
                      
  cens_surv_prob <- stats::stepfun(cens_fit$time, c(1, cens_fit$surv))(df$Y_rmst)

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    !
                    
                      
  df$weights <- df$is_event / cens_surv_prob

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
  # Stabilize weights

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    !
                    
                      
  finite_weights <- df$weights[is.finite(df$weights) & df$weights > 0]

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    !
                    
                      
  if (length(finite_weights) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    !
                    
                      
    weight_cap <- stats::quantile(finite_weights, probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    !
                    
                      
    df$weights[df$weights > weight_cap] <- weight_cap

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    !
                    
                      
  df$weights[!is.finite(df$weights)] <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
  # Filter for model fitting

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    !
                    
                      
  fit_data <- df[df$weights > 0, ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    !
                    
                      
  fit_weights <- fit_data$weights

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    !
                    
                      
  if (length(unique(fit_data[[arm_var]])) < 2) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    !
                    
                      
    stop("Pilot data contains events in only one arm after filtering.", call. = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
  # Fit the primary linear model

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    !
                    
                      
  fit_lm <- stats::lm(model_formula, data = fit_data, weights = fit_weights)

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    !
                    
                      
  beta_hat <- stats::coef(fit_lm)

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
  arm_pattern <- paste0("^factor\\(", arm_var, "\\)1$")

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    !
                    
                      
  arm_coeff_name <- names(beta_hat)[grep(arm_pattern, names(beta_hat))]

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
  if (length(arm_coeff_name) == 0) stop("Could not find treatment effect coefficient.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
  beta_effect <- beta_hat[arm_coeff_name]

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
  # --- Calculate Asymptotic Sandwich Variance Components ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    !
                    
                      
  cat("--- Calculating asymptotic variance... ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    !
                    
                      
  X <- stats::model.matrix(model_formula, data = df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    !
                    
                      
  A_hat <- crossprod(X * sqrt(df$weights), X * sqrt(df$weights)) / n_pilot

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    !
                    
                      
  A_hat_inv <- tryCatch({

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    !
                    
                      
    solve(A_hat)

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    !
                    
                      
  }, error = function(e) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    !
                    
                      
    stop("The design matrix (A_hat) is singular. This can happen with small pilot datasets or perfect separation.", call. = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    !
                    
                      
  df$predicted_rmst <- predict(fit_lm, newdata = df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    !
                    
                      
  residuals <- df$Y_rmst - df$predicted_rmst

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    !
                    
                      
  epsilon <- X * residuals * df$weights

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    !
                    
                      
  epsilon[is.na(epsilon)] <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    !
                    
                      
  B_hat <- crossprod(epsilon) / n_pilot

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    !
                    
                      
  V_hat_n <- A_hat_inv %*% B_hat %*% t(A_hat_inv)

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
  # Scale to get the variance for n=1

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    !
                    
                      
  var_beta_n1 <- V_hat_n[arm_coeff_name, arm_coeff_name]

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    !
                    
                      
  se_beta_n1 <- sqrt(var_beta_n1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
  # Return a list containing the key estimated parameters

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    !
                    
                      
  return(list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    !
                    
                      
    beta_effect = beta_effect,

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    !
                    
                      
    se_beta_n1 = se_beta_n1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    !
                    
                      
    fit_lm = fit_lm

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
  ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
# Power Calculation -------------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
#' @title Analyze Power for a Linear RMST Model (Analytic)

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
#' @description Performs power analysis using a direct formula based on the

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#'   asymptotic variance estimator for the linear RMST model.

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams .estimate_linear_ipcw_params

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
#' @param sample_sizes A numeric vector of sample sizes *per arm* to calculate power for.

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
#' @param alpha The significance level for the power calculation (Type I error rate).

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A `list` containing results.

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
linear.power.analytical.app <- function(pilot_data, time_var, status_var, arm_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
                                    sample_sizes, linear_terms = NULL, L, alpha = 0.05) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
  # 1. Estimate nuisance parameters from pilot data using the helper function

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    !
                    
                      
  params <- .estimate_linear_ipcw_params(pilot_data, time_var, status_var, arm_var, linear_terms, L)

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
  # 2. Calculate Power for Each Sample Size

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    !
                    
                      
  cat("--- Calculating power for specified sample sizes... ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    !
                    
                      
  z_alpha <- stats::qnorm(1 - alpha / 2)

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    !
                    
                      
  power_values <- sapply(sample_sizes, function(n_per_arm) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    !
                    
                      
    total_n <- n_per_arm * 2

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    !
                    
                      
    se_final <- params$se_beta_n1 / sqrt(total_n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    !
                    
                      
    power <- stats::pnorm( (abs(params$beta_effect) / se_final) - z_alpha )

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    !
                    
                      
    return(power)

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    !
                    
                      
  results_df <- data.frame(N_per_Arm = sample_sizes, Power = power_values)

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
  # 3. Create Summary and Plot

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    !
                    
                      
  results_summary <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    !
                    
                      
    Statistic = "Assumed RMST Difference (from pilot)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    !
                    
                      
    Value = params$beta_effect

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    !
                    
                      
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(results_df, ggplot2::aes(x = N_per_Arm, y = Power)) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#D55E00", linewidth = 1) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#D55E00", size = 3) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::labs(

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    !
                    
                      
      title = "Analytic Power Curve: Linear IPCW RMST Model",

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    !
                    
                      
      subtitle = "Based on the asymptotic variance from Tian et al. (2014).",

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    !
                    
                      
      x = "Sample Size Per Arm", y = "Estimated Power"

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
    ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::ylim(0, 1) + ggplot2::theme_minimal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    !
                    
                      
  return(list(results_data = results_df, results_plot = p, results_summary = results_summary))

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
# Sample Size Search ------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
#' @title Find Sample Size for a Linear RMST Model (Analytic)

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
#' @description Calculates the required sample size for a target power using an

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
#'   analytic formula based on the methods of Tian et al. (2014).

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams .estimate_linear_ipcw_params

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
#' @param target_power A single numeric value for the desired power (e.g., 0.80 or 0.90).

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
#' @param alpha The significance level (Type I error rate).

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
#' @param n_start The starting sample size *per arm* for the search.

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
#' @param n_step The increment in sample size at each step of the search.

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
#' @param max_n_per_arm The maximum sample size *per arm* to search up to.

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A `list` containing results.

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
linear.ss.analytical.app <- function(pilot_data, time_var, status_var, arm_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
                                 target_power, linear_terms = NULL, L, alpha = 0.05,

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
                                 n_start = 50, n_step = 25, max_n_per_arm = 2000) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
  # 1. Estimate parameters from pilot data using the helper function

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    !
                    
                      
  params <- .estimate_linear_ipcw_params(pilot_data, time_var, status_var, arm_var, linear_terms, L)

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
  # 2. Iterative Search for Sample Size using Analytic Formula

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    !
                    
                      
  cat("--- Searching for Sample Size (Method: Analytic) ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    !
                    
                      
  current_n <- n_start

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    !
                    
                      
  search_path <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    !
                    
                      
  final_n <- NA_integer_

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    !
                    
                      
  z_alpha <- stats::qnorm(1 - alpha / 2)

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    !
                    
                      
  while (current_n <= max_n_per_arm) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    !
                    
                      
    total_n <- current_n * 2

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    !
                    
                      
    se_final <- params$se_beta_n1 / sqrt(total_n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    !
                    
                      
    calculated_power <- stats::pnorm((abs(params$beta_effect) / se_final) - z_alpha)

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    !
                    
                      
    if (!is.finite(calculated_power)) calculated_power <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
    

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    !
                    
                      
    search_path[[as.character(current_n)]] <- calculated_power

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    !
                    
                      
    cat(paste0("  N = ", current_n, "/arm, Calculated Power = ", round(calculated_power, 3), "\n"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
    

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    !
                    
                      
    if (calculated_power >= target_power) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    !
                    
                      
      final_n <- current_n

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    !
                    
                      
      break

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    !
                    
                      
    current_n <- current_n + n_step

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    !
                    
                      
  if (is.na(final_n)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    !
                    
                      
    warning(paste("Target power", target_power, "not achieved by max N of", max_n_per_arm), call. = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    !
                    
                      
    final_n <- max_n_per_arm

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      
  # 3. Finalize and Return Results

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    !
                    
                      
  results_summary <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    !
                    
                      
    Statistic = "Assumed RMST Difference (from pilot)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    !
                    
                      
    Value = params$beta_effect

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    !
                    
                      
  results_df <- data.frame(Target_Power = target_power, Required_N_per_Arm = final_n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    !
                    
                      
  search_path_df <- data.frame(N_per_Arm = as.integer(names(search_path)), Power = unlist(search_path))

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    !
                    
                      
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(na.omit(search_path_df), ggplot2::aes(x = N_per_Arm, y = Power)) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#009E73", linewidth = 1) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#009E73", size = 3) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = target_power, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = final_n, linetype = "dotted", color = "blue") +

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::labs(

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    !
                    
                      
      title = "Analytic Sample Size Search: Linear IPCW RMST Model",

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    !
                    
                      
      subtitle = "Power calculated from formula at each step.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    !
                    
                      
      x = "Sample Size Per Arm", y = "Calculated Power"

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    !
                    
                      
    ) + ggplot2::theme_minimal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    !
                    
                      
  cat("\n--- Calculation Summary ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    !
                    
                      
  print(knitr::kable(results_df, caption = "Required Sample Size"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    !
                    
                      
  return(list(results_data = results_df, results_plot = p, results_summary = results_summary))

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
