                    237
                    
                    
                      
#' @param linear_terms Optional character vector of covariates with a linear effect.

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    
                    
                      
#' @param smooth_terms Optional character vector of covariates with a non-linear effect.

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    
                    
                      
#' @param L The numeric truncation time for RMST.

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    
                    
                      
#' @param n_sim Number of bootstrap simulations per search step.

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    
                    
                      
#' @param alpha The significance level.

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    
                    
                      
#' @param parallel.cores Number of cores for parallel processing.

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    
                    
                      
#' @param patience Number of consecutive non-improving steps in the search before terminating.

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    
                    
                      
#' @param n_start The starting sample size per arm/stratum for the search.

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    
                    
                      
#' @param n_step The increment in sample size at each step of the search.

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    
                    
                      
#' @param max_n_per_arm The maximum sample size per arm/stratum to search up to.

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A `list` containing:

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    
                    
                      
#' \item{results_data}{A `data.frame` with the target power and required sample size.}

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    
                    
                      
#' \item{results_plot}{A `ggplot` object of the search path.}

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    
                    
                      
#' \item{results_summary}{A `data.frame` summarizing the estimated treatment effect.}

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom survival survfit Surv

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom stats stepfun integrate lm as.formula complete.cases na.omit sd quantile predict

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom mgcv gam summary.gam

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom ggplot2 ggplot aes geom_line geom_point geom_hline geom_vline labs theme_minimal

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom knitr kable

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom future plan multisession sequential

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom future.apply future_lapply

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    
                    
                      
#' pilot_df_effect <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    
                    
                      
#'   time = c(stats::rexp(50, 0.1), stats::rexp(50, 0.04)), # Effect

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    
                    
                      
#'   status = stats::rbinom(100, 1, 0.9),

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    
                    
                      
#'   arm = rep(0:1, each = 50)

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    269
                    
                    
                      
#' ss_results <- GAM.ss.boot(

                    		
                  

                  

                    270
                    
                    
                      
#'   pilot_data = pilot_df_effect,

                    		
                  

                  

                    271
                    
                    
                      
#'   time_var = "time",

                    		
                  

                  

                    272
                    
                    
                      
#'   status_var = "status",

                    		
                  

                  

                    273
                    
                    
                      
#'   arm_var = "arm",

                    		
                  

                  

                    274
                    
                    
                      
#'   target_power = 0.80,

                    		
                  

                  

                    275
                    
                    
                      
#'   L = 15,

                    		
                  

                  

                    276
                    
                    
                      
#'   n_sim = 100,      # Low n_sim for example

                    		
                  

                  

                    277
                    
                    
                      
#'   n_start = 100,

                    		
                  

                  

                    278
                    
                    
                      
#'   n_step = 50,

                    		
                  

                  

                    279
                    
                    
                      
#'   patience = 2,

                    		
                  

                  

                    280
                    
                    
                      
#'   parallel.cores = 2

                    		
                  

                  

                    281
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    282
                    
                    
                      
#' print(ss_results$results_data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    283
                    
                    
                      
#' print(ss_results$results_plot)

                    		
                  

                  

                    284
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    285
                    
                    
                      
GAM.ss.boot <- function(pilot_data, time_var, status_var, arm_var, strata_var = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    286
                    
                    
                      
                        target_power,

                    		
                  

                  

                    287
                    
                    
                      
                        linear_terms = NULL, smooth_terms = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    288
                    
                    
                      
                        L, n_sim = 1000, alpha = 0.05,

                    		
                  

                  

                    289
                    
                    
                      
                        parallel.cores = 1, patience = 5,

                    		
                  

                  

                    290
                    
                    
                      
                        n_start = 50, n_step = 25, max_n_per_arm = 2000) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    291
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    292
                    !
                    
                      
   start_time <- proc.time()

                    		
                  

                  

                    293
                    !
                    
                      
   if (is.null(target_power) || length(target_power) != 1 || !is.numeric(target_power)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    294
                    !
                    
                      
      stop("You must provide a single numeric value for 'target_power'.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    295
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    296
                    !
                    
                      
   if (parallel.cores > 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    297
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!requireNamespace("future", quietly = TRUE) || !requireNamespace("future.apply", quietly = TRUE)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    298
                    !
                    
                      
         stop("Packages 'future' and 'future.apply' are required for parallel processing.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    299
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    300
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    301
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    302
                    !
                    
                      
   is_stratified <- !is.null(strata_var)

                    		
                  

                  

                    303
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    304
                    
                    
                      
   # --- Prepare data ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    305
                    !
                    
                      
   core_vars <- c(time_var, status_var, arm_var, strata_var)

                    		
                  

                  

                    306
                    !
                    
                      
   all_vars <- c(core_vars, linear_terms, smooth_terms)

                    		
                  

                  

                    307
                    !
                    
                      
   pilot_data <- pilot_data[stats::complete.cases(pilot_data[, all_vars]), ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    308
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    309
                    
                    
                      
   # --- Model Formula Construction ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    310
                    !
                    
                      
   smooth_part <- if (!is.null(smooth_terms)) paste0("s(", smooth_terms, ")") else NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    311
                    !
                    
                      
   if (is_stratified) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    312
                    !
                    
                      
      pilot_groups <- split(pilot_data, pilot_data[[strata_var]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    313
                    !
                    
                      
      all_terms <- c(strata_var, paste0(arm_var, ":", strata_var), smooth_part, linear_terms)

                    		
                  

                  

                    314
                    !
                    
                      
      test_term_pattern <- paste0("^", arm_var, "[^:]*:")

                    		
                  

                  

                    315
                    
                    
                      
   } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    316
                    !
                    
                      
      pilot_groups <- list(pilot_data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    317
                    !
                    
                      
      all_terms <- c(arm_var, smooth_part, linear_terms)

                    		
                  

                  

                    318
                    !
                    
                      
      test_term_pattern <- paste0("^", arm_var)

                    		
                  

                  

                    319
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    320
                    !
                    
                      
   model_rhs <- paste(all_terms[!sapply(all_terms, is.null)], collapse = " + ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    321
                    !
                    
                      
   model_formula <- stats::as.formula(paste("pseudo_obs ~", model_rhs))

                    		
                  

                  

                    322
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    323
                    
                    
                      
   # --- Helper to calculate jackknife pseudo-observations ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    324
                    !
                    
                      
   get_pseudo_obs <- function(time, status, L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    325
                    !
                    
                      
      n <- length(time)

                    		
                  

                  

                    326
                    !
                    
                      
      if (n == 0) return(numeric(0))

                    		
                  

                  

                    327
                    !
                    
                      
      km_fit_full <- survival::survfit(survival::Surv(time, status) ~ 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    328
                    !
                    
                      
      km_step_full <- stats::stepfun(km_fit_full$time, c(1, km_fit_full$surv))

                    		
                  

                  

                    329
                    !
                    
                      
      rmst_full <- tryCatch(stats::integrate(km_step_full, 0, L, subdivisions=2000, stop.on.error = FALSE)$value, error = function(e) 0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    330
                    !
                    
                      
      rmst_loo <- vapply(seq_len(n), function(i) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    331
                    !
                    
                      
         if(n > 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    332
                    !
                    
                      
            km_fit_loo <- survival::survfit(survival::Surv(time[-i], status[-i]) ~ 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    333
                    !
                    
                      
            km_step_loo <- stats::stepfun(km_fit_loo$time, c(1, km_fit_loo$surv))

                    		
                  

                  

                    334
                    !
                    
                      
            tryCatch(stats::integrate(km_step_loo, 0, L, subdivisions=2000, stop.on.error = FALSE)$value, error = function(e) 0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    335
                    !
                    
                      
         } else { 0 }

                    		
                  

                  

                    336
                    !
                    
                      
      }, FUN.VALUE = numeric(1))

                    		
                  

                  

                    337
                    !
                    
                      
      return(n * rmst_full - (n - 1) * rmst_loo)

                    		
                  

                  

                    338
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    339
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    340
                    !
                    
                      
   group_label <- if(is_stratified) "/stratum" else "/arm"

                    		
                  

                  

                    341
                    !
                    
                      
   cat("--- Searching for Sample Size (Method: Additive GAM for RMST) ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    342
                    !
                    
                      
   message("Model: pseudo_obs ~ ", model_rhs)

                    		
                  

                  

                    343
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    344
                    
                    
                      
   # Set up parallel plan

                    		
                  

                  

                    345
                    !
                    
                      
   if (parallel.cores > 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    346
                    !
                    
                      
      future::plan(future::multisession, workers = parallel.cores)

                    		
                  

                  

                    347
                    
                    
                      
   } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    348
                    !
                    
                      
      future::plan(future::sequential)

                    		
                  

                  

                    349
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    350
                    !
                    
                      
   on.exit(future::plan(future::sequential), add = TRUE) # Ensure plan is reset

                    		
                  

                  

                    351
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    352
                    
                    
                      
   # --- Main Search Loop ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    353
                    !
                    
                      
   current_n <- n_start

                    		
                  

                  

                    354
                    !
                    
                      
   max_power_so_far <- -1

                    		
                  

                  

                    355
                    !
                    
                      
   stagnation_counter <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    356
                    !
                    
                      
   n_at_max_power <- n_start

                    		
                  

                  

                    357
                    !
                    
                      
   best_sim_output <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    358
                    !
                    
                      
   search_results <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    359
                    !
                    
                      
   final_n <- NA

                    		
                  

                  

                    360
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    361
                    !
                    
                      
   while (current_n <= max_n_per_arm) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    362
                    !
                    
                      
      cat(paste0("  N = ", current_n, group_label, ", Calculating Power..."))

                    		
                  

                  

                    363
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    364
                    !
                    
                      
      sim_results_list <- future.apply::future_lapply(1:n_sim, function(j) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    365
                    !
                    
                      
         p_val <- NA_real_; est_val <- NA_real_; se_val <- NA_real_

                    		
                  

                  

                    366
                    !
                    
                      
         if (is_stratified) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    367
                    !
                    
                      
            boot_list <- lapply(pilot_groups, function(group_df) group_df[sample(1:nrow(group_df), size = current_n, replace = TRUE), ])

                    		
                  

                  

                    368
                    
                    
                      
         } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    369
                    !
                    
                      
            group_arms <- split(pilot_groups[[1]], pilot_groups[[1]][[arm_var]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    370
                    !
                    
                      
            boot_list <- lapply(group_arms, function(arm_df) arm_df[sample(1:nrow(arm_df), size = current_n, replace = TRUE), ])

                    		
                  

                  

                    371
                    
                    
                      
         }

                    		
                  

                  

                    372
                    !
                    
                      
         boot_data <- do.call(rbind, boot_list)

                    		
                  

                  

                    373
                    !
                    
                      
         grouping_var <- if(is_stratified) strata_var else arm_var

                    		
                  

                  

                    374
                    !
                    
                      
         pseudo_obs_list <- by(boot_data, boot_data[[grouping_var]], function(sub_data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    375
                    !
                    
                      
            sub_data$pseudo_obs <- get_pseudo_obs(sub_data[[time_var]], sub_data[[status_var]], L)

                    		
                  

                  

                    376
                    !
                    
                      
            sub_data

                    		
                  

                  

                    377
                    
                    
                      
         })

                    		
                  

                  

                    378
                    !
                    
                      
         boot_data <- do.call(rbind, pseudo_obs_list)

                    		
                  

                  

                    379
                    !
                    
                      
         fit <- tryCatch(mgcv::gam(model_formula, data = boot_data), error = function(e) NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    380
                    !
                    
                      
         if (!is.null(fit)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    381
                    !
                    
                      
            sfit <- mgcv::summary.gam(fit)

                    		
                  

                  

                    382
                    !
                    
                      
            p_table <- sfit$p.table

                    		
                  

                  

                    383
                    !
                    
                      
            matching_rows <- grep(test_term_pattern, rownames(p_table), fixed = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    384
                    !
                    
                      
            if (length(matching_rows) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    385
                    !
                    
                      
               p_val <- min(p_table[matching_rows, "Pr(>|t|)"], na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    386
                    !
                    
                      
               est_val <- mean(p_table[matching_rows, "Estimate"], na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    387
                    !
                    
                      
               se_val <- mean(p_table[matching_rows, "Std. Error"], na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    388
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    389
                    
                    
                      
         }

                    		
                  

                  

                    390
                    !
                    
                      
         return(list(p_value = p_val, estimate = est_val, std_error = se_val))

                    		
                  

                  

                    391
                    !
                    
                      
      }, future.seed = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    392
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    393
                    !
                    
                      
      p_values <- vapply(sim_results_list, `[[`, "p_value", FUN.VALUE = numeric(1))

                    		
                  

                  

                    394
                    !
                    
                      
      estimates <- vapply(sim_results_list, `[[`, "estimate", FUN.VALUE = numeric(1))

                    		
                  

                  

                    395
                    !
                    
                      
      std_errors <- vapply(sim_results_list, `[[`, "std_error", FUN.VALUE = numeric(1))

                    		
                  

                  

                    396
                    !
                    
                      
      sim_output <- list(power = mean(p_values < alpha, na.rm = TRUE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    397
                    !
                    
                      
                         estimates = estimates, std_errors = std_errors)

                    		
                  

                  

                    398
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    399
                    !
                    
                      
      calculated_power <- if(is.finite(sim_output$power)) sim_output$power else 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    400
                    !
                    
                      
      search_results[[as.character(current_n)]] <- calculated_power

                    		
                  

                  

                    401
                    !
                    
                      
      cat(paste0(" Power = ", round(calculated_power, 3), "\n"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    402
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    403
                    !
                    
                      
      if (calculated_power >= target_power) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    404
                    !
                    
                      
         message("Success: Target power reached at N = ", current_n, group_label, ".")

                    		
                  

                  

                    405
                    !
                    
                      
         best_sim_output <- sim_output

                    		
                  

                  

                    406
                    !
                    
                      
         final_n <- current_n

                    		
                  

                  

                    407
                    !
                    
                      
         break

                    		
                  

                  

                    408
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    409
                    !
                    
                      
      if (calculated_power > max_power_so_far) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    410
                    !
                    
                      
         max_power_so_far <- calculated_power

                    		
                  

                  

                    411
                    !
                    
                      
         n_at_max_power <- current_n

                    		
                  

                  

                    412
                    !
                    
                      
         best_sim_output <- sim_output

                    		
                  

                  

                    413
                    !
                    
                      
         stagnation_counter <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    414
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    415
                    !
                    
                      
         stagnation_counter <- stagnation_counter + 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    416
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    417
                    !
                    
                      
      if (stagnation_counter >= patience) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    418
                    !
                    
                      
         warning(paste0("Search terminated due to stagnation. Best N = ", n_at_max_power,

                    		
                  

                  

                    419
                    !
                    
                      
                        " with power = ", round(max_power_so_far, 3)), call. = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    420
                    !
                    
                      
         final_n <- n_at_max_power

                    		
                  

                  

                    421
                    !
                    
                      
         break

                    		
                  

                  

                    422
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    423
                    !
                    
                      
      current_n <- current_n + n_step

                    		
                  

                  

                    424
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    425
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    426
                    !
                    
                      
   if (is.na(final_n) && current_n > max_n_per_arm) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    427
                    !
                    
                      
      warning(paste("Target power", target_power, "not achieved by max N of", max_n_per_arm))

                    		
                  

                  

                    428
                    !
                    
                      
      final_n <- n_at_max_power

                    		
                  

                  

                    429
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    430
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    431
                    
                    
                      
   # --- Finalize Summary, Plot, and Results ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    432
                    !
                    
                      
   results_summary <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    433
                    !
                    
                      
   if (!is.null(best_sim_output)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    434
                    !
                    
                      
      est <- stats::na.omit(best_sim_output$estimates)

                    		
                  

                  

                    435
                    !
                    
                      
      se  <- stats::na.omit(best_sim_output$std_errors)

                    		
                  

                  

                    436
                    !
                    
                      
      if(length(est) > 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    437
                    !
                    
                      
         results_summary <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    438
                    !
                    
                      
            Statistic = c("Mean RMST Difference", "Mean Standard Error", "95% CI Lower", "95% CI Upper"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    439
                    !
                    
                      
            Value = c(mean(est), mean(se, na.rm=TRUE), mean(est) - 1.96 * stats::sd(est), mean(est) + 1.96 * stats::sd(est))

                    		
                  

                  

                    440
                    
                    
                      
         )

                    		
                  

                  

                    441
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    442
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    443
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    444
                    !
                    
                      
   results_df <- data.frame(Target_Power = target_power, Required_N_per_Group = final_n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    445
                    !
                    
                      
   search_path_df <- data.frame(N_per_Group = as.integer(names(search_results)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    446
                    !
                    
                      
                                Power = unlist(search_results))

                    		
                  

                  

                    447
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    448
                    !
                    
                      
   p <- ggplot2::ggplot(na.omit(search_path_df), ggplot2::aes(x = N_per_Group, y = Power)) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    449
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#009E73", linewidth = 1) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    450
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#009E73", size = 3) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    451
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = target_power, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +

                    		
                  

                  

                    452
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = final_n, linetype = "dotted", color = "blue") +

                    		
                  

                  

                    453
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::labs(title = "Sample Size Search Path: Additive GAM RMST Model",

                    		
                  

                  

                    454
                    !
                    
                      
                    x = paste0("Sample Size Per ", if(is_stratified) "Stratum" else "Arm"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    455
                    !
                    
                      
                    y = "Calculated Power") +

                    		
                  

                  

                    456
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::theme_minimal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    457
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    458
                    !
                    
                      
   end_time <- proc.time()

                    		
                  

                  

                    459
                    !
                    
                      
   elapsed_time <- round((end_time - start_time)["elapsed"], 2)

                    		
                  

                  

                    460
                    !
                    
                      
   message(paste("Total simulation time:", elapsed_time, "seconds"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    461
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    462
                    !
                    
                      
   cat("\n--- Simulation Summary ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    463
                    !
                    
                      
   if (!is.null(results_summary)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    464
                    !
                    
                      
      print(knitr::kable(results_summary, caption = "Estimated Treatment Effect (RMST Difference)"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    465
                    
                    
                      
   } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    466
                    !
                    
                      
      cat("No valid estimates were generated to create a summary.\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    467
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    468
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    469
                    !
                    
                      
   return(list(results_data = results_df, results_plot = p, results_summary = results_summary))

                    		
                  

                  

                    470
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    471
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# Power Calculation -------------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' @title Analyze Power for a Linear RMST Model (Analytic)

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' @description Performs power analysis using a direct formula based on the

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'   asymptotic variance estimator for the linear RMST model.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @details

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' This function implements the analytic power calculation for the direct linear

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' regression model of the Restricted Mean Survival Time (RMST) proposed by Tian et al. (2014).

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' The core of the method is a weighted linear model of the form

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' \deqn{E[Y_i|Z_i] = \beta_0 + \beta_1 Z_i}

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' where \eqn{Y_i = \min(T_i, \L)} is the event time truncated at \eqn{\L}.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' To handle right-censoring, the method uses Inverse Probability of Censoring

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' Weighting (IPCW). The weight for an uncensored individual `i` is the inverse

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' of the probability of remaining uncensored until their event time, \eqn{w_i = \delta_i / \hat{G}(Y_i)},

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' where \eqn{\hat{G}(t) = P(C > t)} is the Kaplan-Meier estimate of the censoring distribution.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' Power is calculated analytically based on the asymptotic properties of the

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' coefficient estimators. The variance of the treatment effect estimator, \eqn{\hat{\beta}}, is derived from a

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' robust sandwich variance estimator of the form \eqn{A^{-1}B(A^{-1})'}. In this implementation,

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' `A` is the scaled information matrix \eqn{(X'WX)/n}, and `B` is the empirical second moment of the

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' influence functions, \eqn{(\sum \epsilon_i \epsilon_i')/n}, where \eqn{\epsilon_i} is the influence curve

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' for observation `i`. The resulting variance is used to calculate the standard error for a

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' given sample size, which in turn is used in the power formula.

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' @param pilot_data A `data.frame` containing pilot study data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' @param time_var A character string specifying the name of the time-to-event variable.

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' @param status_var A character string specifying the name of the event status variable (1=event, 0=censored).

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' @param arm_var A character string specifying the name of the treatment arm variable (1=treatment, 0=control).

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' @param sample_sizes A numeric vector of sample sizes *per arm* to calculate power for.

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' @param linear_terms An optional character vector of other covariate names to include in the model.

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' @param L The numeric value for the RMST truncation time.

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' @param alpha The significance level for the power calculation (Type I error rate).

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A `list` containing:

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' \item{results_data}{A `data.frame` with the specified sample sizes and their corresponding calculated power.}

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' \item{results_plot}{A `ggplot` object visualizing the power curve.}

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' \item{results_summary}{A `data.frame` summarizing the treatment effect from the pilot data used for the calculation.}

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom survival Surv survfit

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom stats lm as.formula complete.cases na.omit sd quantile pnorm qnorm model.matrix coef vcov predict

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom ggplot2 ggplot aes geom_line geom_point geom_hline labs theme_minimal ylim

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom knitr kable

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' pilot_df <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#'   time = rexp(100, 0.1),

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'   status = rbinom(100, 1, 0.7),

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'   arm = rep(0:1, each = 50),

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'   age = rnorm(100, 55, 10)

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' power_results <- linear.power.analytical(

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#'   pilot_data = pilot_df,

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#'   time_var = "time",

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#'   status_var = "status",

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'   arm_var = "arm",

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#'   linear_terms = "age",

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#'   sample_sizes = c(100, 200, 300),

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#'   L = 10

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#' print(power_results$results_data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#' print(power_results$results_plot)

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
linear.power.analytical <- function(pilot_data, time_var, status_var, arm_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
                                    sample_sizes, linear_terms = NULL, L, alpha = 0.05) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
   # --- 1. Estimate Nuisance Parameters from Pilot Data ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    !
                    
                      
   cat("--- Estimating parameters from pilot data for analytic calculation... ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    !
                    
                      
   core_vars <- c(time_var, status_var, arm_var)

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    !
                    
                      
   all_vars <- c(core_vars, linear_terms)

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    !
                    
                      
   df <- pilot_data[stats::complete.cases(pilot_data[, all_vars]), ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    !
                    
                      
   n_pilot <- nrow(df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
   # Define model formulas

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    !
                    
                      
   factor_arm_str <- paste0("factor(", arm_var, ")")

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    !
                    
                      
   model_rhs <- paste(c(factor_arm_str, linear_terms), collapse = " + ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    !
                    
                      
   model_formula <- stats::as.formula(paste("Y_rmst ~", model_rhs))

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    !
                    
                      
   message("Model: Y_rmst ~ ", model_rhs)

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
   # Prepare data for IPCW

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    !
                    
                      
   df$Y_rmst <- pmin(df[[time_var]], L)

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    !
                    
                      
   df$is_censored <- df[[status_var]] == 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    !
                    
                      
   df$is_event <- df[[status_var]] == 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
   # Fit censoring model (Kaplan-Meier for G(t))

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    !
                    
                      
   cens_fit <- survival::survfit(survival::Surv(Y_rmst, is_censored) ~ 1, data = df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    !
                    
                      
   cens_surv_prob <- stats::stepfun(cens_fit$time, c(1, cens_fit$surv))(df$Y_rmst)

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    !
                    
                      
   df$weights <- df$is_event / cens_surv_prob

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
   # Stabilize weights

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    !
                    
                      
   finite_weights <- df$weights[is.finite(df$weights) & df$weights > 0]

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    !
                    
                      
   if (length(finite_weights) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    !
                    
                      
      weight_cap <- stats::quantile(finite_weights, probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    !
                    
                      
      df$weights[df$weights > weight_cap] <- weight_cap

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    !
                    
                      
   df$weights[!is.finite(df$weights)] <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
   # Filter for model fitting

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    !
                    
                      
   fit_data <- df[df$weights > 0, ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    !
                    
                      
   fit_weights <- fit_data$weights

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    !
                    
                      
   if (length(unique(fit_data[[arm_var]])) < 2) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    !
                    
                      
      stop("Pilot data contains events in only one arm after filtering.", call. = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
   # Fit the primary linear model

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    !
                    
                      
   fit_lm <- stats::lm(model_formula, data = fit_data, weights = fit_weights)

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    !
                    
                      
   beta_hat <- stats::coef(fit_lm)

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    !
                    
                      
   arm_pattern <- paste0("^factor\\(", arm_var, "\\)1$")

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    !
                    
                      
   arm_coeff_name <- names(beta_hat)[grep(arm_pattern, names(beta_hat))]

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    !
                    
                      
   if (length(arm_coeff_name) == 0) stop("Could not find treatment effect coefficient.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    !
                    
                      
   beta_effect <- beta_hat[arm_coeff_name]

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
   # --- 2. Calculate Asymptotic Sandwich Variance Components ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    !
                    
                      
   cat("--- Calculating asymptotic variance... ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    !
                    
                      
   X <- stats::model.matrix(model_formula, data = df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    !
                    
                      
   A_hat <- crossprod(X * sqrt(df$weights), X * sqrt(df$weights)) / n_pilot

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    !
                    
                      
   A_hat_inv <- tryCatch({

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    !
                    
                      
      solve(A_hat)

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    !
                    
                      
   }, error = function(e) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    !
                    
                      
      stop("The design matrix (A_hat) is singular. This can happen with small pilot datasets or perfect separation.", call. = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
   })

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    !
                    
                      
   df$predicted_rmst <- predict(fit_lm, newdata = df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    !
                    
                      
   residuals <- df$Y_rmst - df$predicted_rmst

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    !
                    
                      
   epsilon <- X * residuals * df$weights

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    !
                    
                      
   epsilon[is.na(epsilon)] <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    !
                    
                      
   B_hat <- crossprod(epsilon) / n_pilot

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    !
                    
                      
   V_hat_n <- A_hat_inv %*% B_hat %*% t(A_hat_inv)

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
   # Scale to get the variance for n=1

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    !
                    
                      
   var_beta_n1 <- V_hat_n[arm_coeff_name, arm_coeff_name]

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    !
                    
                      
   se_beta_n1 <- sqrt(var_beta_n1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
   # --- 4. Calculate Power for Each Sample Size ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    !
                    
                      
   cat("--- Calculating power for specified sample sizes... ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    !
                    
                      
   z_alpha <- stats::qnorm(1 - alpha / 2)

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    !
                    
                      
   power_values <- sapply(sample_sizes, function(n_per_arm) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    !
                    
                      
      total_n <- n_per_arm * 2

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    !
                    
                      
      se_final <- se_beta_n1 / sqrt(total_n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    !
                    
                      
      power <- stats::pnorm( (abs(beta_effect) / se_final) - z_alpha )

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    !
                    
                      
      return(power)

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
   })

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    !
                    
                      
   results_df <- data.frame(N_per_Arm = sample_sizes, Power = power_values)

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
   # --- CORRECTED: Add the summary object to the return list ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    !
                    
                      
   results_summary <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    !
                    
                      
      Statistic = "Assumed RMST Difference (from pilot)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    !
                    
                      
      Value = beta_effect

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
   # --- 5. Create Plot and Return ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    !
                    
                      
   p <- ggplot2::ggplot(results_df, ggplot2::aes(x = N_per_Arm, y = Power)) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#D55E00", linewidth = 1) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#D55E00", size = 3) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::labs(

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    !
                    
                      
         title = "Analytic Power Curve: Linear IPCW RMST Model",

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    !
                    
                      
         subtitle = "Based on the asymptotic variance from Tian et al. (2014).",

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    !
                    
                      
         x = "Sample Size Per Arm", y = "Estimated Power"
