                    288
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    289
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    290
                    
                    
                      
   # --- 3. Finalize and Return Results ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    291
                    !
                    
                      
   results_summary <- data.frame(Statistic = "Assumed log(RMST Ratio) (from pilot)", Value = beta_effect)

                    		
                  

                  

                    292
                    !
                    
                      
   results_df <- data.frame(Target_Power = target_power, Required_N_per_Stratum = final_n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    293
                    !
                    
                      
   search_path_df <- data.frame(N_per_Stratum = as.integer(names(search_path)), Power = unlist(search_path))

                    		
                  

                  

                    294
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    295
                    !
                    
                      
   p <- ggplot2::ggplot(na.omit(search_path_df), ggplot2::aes(x = N_per_Stratum, y = Power)) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    296
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#009E73", linewidth = 1) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    297
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#009E73", size = 3) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    298
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = target_power, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +

                    		
                  

                  

                    299
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = final_n, linetype = "dotted", color = "blue") +

                    		
                  

                  

                    300
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::labs(

                    		
                  

                  

                    301
                    !
                    
                      
         title = "Analytic Sample Size Search: Multiplicative Stratified RMST Model",

                    		
                  

                  

                    302
                    !
                    
                      
         subtitle = "Power calculated from formula at each step (approximate method).",

                    		
                  

                  

                    303
                    !
                    
                      
         x = "Sample Size Per Stratum", y = "Calculated Power"

                    		
                  

                  

                    304
                    !
                    
                      
      ) + ggplot2::theme_minimal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    305
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    306
                    !
                    
                      
   cat("\n--- Calculation Summary ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    307
                    !
                    
                      
   print(knitr::kable(results_df, caption = "Required Sample Size"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    308
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    309
                    !
                    
                      
   return(list(results_data = results_df, results_plot = p, results_summary = results_summary))

                    		
                  

                  

                    310
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    311
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# R/load_sets.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
# Read manifest + datasets back. No L/tau reattachment.

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' Load datasets from a recipe-sets manifest

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' Reads a \code{manifest.rds} created by \code{generate_recipe_sets()}, loads one

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' dataset per row (preferring \code{rds} → \code{rdata} → \code{csv} → \code{txt}),

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' restores attribute \code{"achieved_censoring"}, and returns a named list

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' of \code{list(data = <data.frame>, meta = <list>)}.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @param manifest_path Path to \code{manifest.rds}.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A named list where each element is \code{list(data=..., meta=...)}.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' sets <- load_recipe_sets("checks/manifest.rds")

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' names(sets)

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' str(sets[[1]]$meta)

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
load_recipe_sets <- function(manifest_path) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    !
                    
                      
  man <- readRDS(manifest_path)

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    !
                    
                      
  if (nrow(man) == 0) stop("manifest has 0 rows; rebuild it with rebuild_manifest()")

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    !
                    
                      
  out <- vector("list", nrow(man))

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    !
                    
                      
  read_one <- function(row) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    !
                    
                      
    if (!is.na(row$file_rds))       df <- readRDS(row$file_rds)

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    !
                    
                      
    else if (!is.na(row$file_rdata)) { e <- new.env(parent = emptyenv()); load(row$file_rdata, envir = e); df <- get("dat_obj", envir = e) }

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    !
                    
                      
    else if (!is.na(row$file_csv))  df <- utils::read.csv(row$file_csv, check.names = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    !
                    
                      
    else if (!is.na(row$file_txt))  df <- utils::read.table(row$file_txt, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    !
                    
                      
    else stop("No data file path in manifest row.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    !
                    
                      
    ac <- if ("achieved_censoring" %in% names(row)) row$achieved_censoring else NA_real_

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    !
                    
                      
    if (is.na(ac)) ac <- mean(df$status == 0, na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    !
                    
                      
    attr(df, "achieved_censoring") <- ac

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    !
                    
                      
    meta <- if ("meta" %in% names(row)) row$meta[[1]] else as.list(row)

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    !
                    
                      
    if (is.null(meta) || length(meta) == 0L || is.null(meta$model)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    !
                    
                      
      meta <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    !
                    
                      
        dataset_id = sprintf("sc%03d_r%02d", row$scenario_id, row$rep),

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    !
                    
                      
        scenario_id = row$scenario_id,

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    !
                    
                      
        rep = row$rep,

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    !
                    
                      
        seed_used = row$seed,

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    !
                    
                      
        n = nrow(df),

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    !
                    
                      
        event_rate = mean(df$status == 1L, na.rm = TRUE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    !
                    
                      
        achieved_censoring = ac

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    !
                    
                      
    list(data = df, meta = meta)

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(man))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    !
                    
                      
    out[[i]] <- read_one(man[i, , drop = FALSE])

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
  names(out) <- sprintf("sc%03d_r%02d", man$scenario_id, man$rep)

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
  out

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#' Rebuild manifest for an existing output directory (no re-simulation)

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#' Reads datasets already written in \code{out_dir} and reconstructs a

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#' \code{manifest.rds} with rich metadata (model, baseline, effects, etc.).

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#' @param base_recipe A validated recipe list (use \code{validate_recipe()} if needed).

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#' @param vary Named list used originally in \code{generate_recipe_sets()} for the grid.

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#' @param out_dir Directory that already contains the datasets.

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#' @param filename_template The same template you used when writing files

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#'   (default \code{"sc{scenario_id}_r{rep}"}). It may also include tokens for dotted paths from \code{vary}.

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#' @return The rebuilt manifest (also writes \code{manifest.rds} in \code{out_dir}).

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
rebuild_manifest <- function(base_recipe, vary, out_dir,

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
                             filename_template = "sc{scenario_id}_r{rep}") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    !
                    
                      
  `%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    !
                    
                      
  sanitize <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    !
                    
                      
    x <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    !
                    
                      
    x <- gsub("_+", "_", x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    !
                    
                      
    x <- sub("^_", "", x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    !
                    
                      
    x <- sub("_$", "", x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    !
                    
                      
    x

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    !
                    
                      
  build_name <- function(template, tokens) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    !
                    
                      
    out <- template

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    !
                    
                      
    for (nm in names(tokens)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    !
                    
                      
      ph  <- paste0("{", nm, "}")

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    !
                    
                      
      val <- tokens[[nm]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    !
                    
                      
      if (is.numeric(val) && length(val) == 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    !
                    
                      
        val <- format(val, digits = 6, trim = TRUE, scientific = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    !
                    
                      
      if (length(val) > 1) val <- paste(val, collapse = "-")

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    !
                    
                      
      out <- gsub(ph, as.character(val), out, fixed = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    !
                    
                      
    sanitize(out)

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    !
                    
                      
  get_by_path <- function(obj, path) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    !
                    
                      
    parts <- strsplit(path, ".", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    !
                    
                      
    cur <- obj

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    !
                    
                      
    for (p in parts) cur <- cur[[p]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    !
                    
                      
    cur

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    !
                    
                      
  collect_meta <- function(dat, recipe, files, seed, scenario_id, rep, sc_params) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    !
                    
                      
    has_arm <- "arm" %in% names(dat)

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    !
                    
                      
    list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    !
                    
                      
      dataset_id = sprintf("sc%03d_r%02d", scenario_id, rep),

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    !
                    
                      
      scenario_id = scenario_id,

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    !
                    
                      
      rep = rep,

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    !
                    
                      
      seed_used = seed %||% NA_integer_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    !
                    
                      
      n = nrow(dat),

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    !
                    
                      
      n_treat = if (has_arm) sum(dat$arm == 1L) else NA_integer_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    !
                    
                      
      n_control = if (has_arm) sum(dat$arm == 0L) else NA_integer_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    !
                    
                      
      event_rate = mean(dat$status == 1L),

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    !
                    
                      
      achieved_censoring = attr(dat, "achieved_censoring", exact = TRUE) %||% mean(dat$status == 0L),

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    !
                    
                      
      model = recipe$event_time$model,

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    !
                    
                      
      baseline = recipe$event_time$baseline,

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    !
                    
                      
      effects  = recipe$event_time$effects,

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    !
                    
                      
      treatment = recipe$treatment %||% NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    !
                    
                      
      censoring = recipe$censoring %||% NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    !
                    
                      
      covariates = if (!is.null(recipe$covariates$defs))

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    !
                    
                      
        lapply(recipe$covariates$defs, function(d) d[c("name","type","dist","params")]) else NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    !
                    
                      
      allocation = recipe$treatment$allocation %||% NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    !
                    
                      
      params = sc_params,

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    !
                    
                      
      files = files,

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    !
                    
                      
      created_at = as.character(Sys.time())

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!dir.exists(out_dir))

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    !
                    
                      
    stop("out_dir does not exist: ", out_dir)

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    !
                    
                      
  base_recipe <- validate_recipe(base_recipe)

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    !
                    
                      
  grids <- recipe_grid(base_recipe, vary)

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!length(grids)) grids <- list(base_recipe)

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    !
                    
                      
  rows <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    !
                    
                      
  sc_id <- 0L

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    !
                    
                      
  matched_any <- FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    !
                    
                      
  for (r in grids) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    !
                    
                      
    sc_id <- sc_id + 1L

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    !
                    
                      
    sc_params <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    !
                    
                      
    if (length(vary)) for (k in names(vary)) sc_params[[k]] <- get_by_path(r, k)

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    !
                    
                      
    consecutive_gaps <- 0L

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    !
                    
                      
    for (rep in 1:999) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    !
                    
                      
      base_name <- build_name(filename_template, c(list(scenario_id = sc_id, rep = rep), sc_params))

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    !
                    
                      
      fp <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    !
                    
                      
        rds   = file.path(out_dir, paste0(base_name, ".rds")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    !
                    
                      
        csv   = file.path(out_dir, paste0(base_name, ".csv")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    !
                    
                      
        txt   = file.path(out_dir, paste0(base_name, ".txt")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    !
                    
                      
        rdata = file.path(out_dir, paste0(base_name, ".RData"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    !
                    
                      
      exists_any <- file.exists(fp$rds) | file.exists(fp$csv) | file.exists(fp$txt) | file.exists(fp$rdata)

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!exists_any) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    !
                    
                      
        consecutive_gaps <- consecutive_gaps + 1L

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    !
                    
                      
        if (rep == 1) break

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    !
                    
                      
        if (consecutive_gaps >= 3L) break

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    !
                    
                      
        next

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    !
                    
                      
      matched_any <- TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    !
                    
                      
      consecutive_gaps <- 0L

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    !
                    
                      
      if (file.exists(fp$rds)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    !
                    
                      
        dat <- readRDS(fp$rds)

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    !
                    
                      
      } else if (file.exists(fp$rdata)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    !
                    
                      
        e <- new.env(parent = emptyenv()); load(fp$rdata, envir = e); dat <- get("dat_obj", envir = e)

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    !
                    
                      
      } else if (file.exists(fp$csv)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    !
                    
                      
        dat <- utils::read.csv(fp$csv, check.names = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    !
                    
                      
        dat <- utils::read.table(fp$txt, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    !
                    
                      
      meta_full <- collect_meta(

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    !
                    
                      
        dat = dat, recipe = r, files = fp, seed = NA_integer_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    !
                    
                      
        scenario_id = sc_id, rep = rep, sc_params = sc_params

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    !
                    
                      
      row <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    !
                    
                      
        scenario_id = sc_id, rep = rep, seed = NA_integer_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    !
                    
                      
        achieved_censoring = meta_full$achieved_censoring, n = nrow(dat),

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    !
                    
                      
        file_txt = if (file.exists(fp$txt)) fp$txt else NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    !
                    
                      
        file_csv = if (file.exists(fp$csv)) fp$csv else NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    !
                    
                      
        file_rds = if (file.exists(fp$rds)) fp$rds else NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    !
                    
                      
        file_rdata = if (file.exists(fp$rdata)) fp$rdata else NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    !
                    
                      
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    !
                    
                      
      if (length(sc_params)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    !
                    
                      
        add <- as.list(sc_params); names(add) <- paste0("p__", sanitize(names(add)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    !
                    
                      
        for (nm in names(add)) row[[nm]] <- as.character(add[[nm]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    !
                    
                      
      row$meta <- I(list(meta_full))

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    !
                    
                      
      rows[[length(rows) + 1L]] <- row

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!matched_any) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    !
                    
                      
    stop(

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    !
                    
                      
      "rebuild_manifest(): no files matched the expected names under out_dir = '", out_dir, "'.\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    !
                    
                      
      "Check filename_template and vary, and ensure files exist."

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    !
                    
                      
  man <- do.call(rbind, rows)

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    !
                    
                      
  saveRDS(man, file.path(out_dir, "manifest.rds"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    !
                    
                      
  man

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# R/describe_generation.R

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' Summarize a generated dataset and its simulation mechanism

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' Given one element returned by [load_recipe_sets()] (a list with \code{data} and

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' a rich \code{meta} list), this builds tidy tables describing the data-generating

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' process: model family, baseline parameters, linear predictor coefficients

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' (intercept / treatment / covariates), treatment assignment, and censoring.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param set A single element from [load_recipe_sets()], i.e. \code{list(data=<df>, meta=<list>)}.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A list of data frames:

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' \itemize{

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item \code{header}: \code{n}, \code{L} (analysis horizon; stored as attr \code{"tau"}), \code{model},

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'         \code{event_rate}, \code{achieved_censoring}.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item \code{baseline}: flattened baseline parameters.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item \code{effects}: coefficients for intercept/treatment and covariates (and formula terms if used).

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item \code{treatment}: assignment mechanism and knobs.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item \code{censoring}: censoring mode/target/admin time.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item \code{covariates}: each generated covariate with its distribution and parameters.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item \code{files}: paths to on-disk files (csv/rds/rdata) when available.

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' sets <- load_recipe_sets("checks/manifest.rds")

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' spec <- describe_generation(sets[[1]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' spec$header

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' spec$baseline

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' spec$effects

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' spec$treatment

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' spec$censoring

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' spec$covariates

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' spec$files

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
describe_generation <- function(set) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    !
                    
                      
   `%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    !
                    
                      
   .pretty_model <- function(m) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    !
                    
                      
      switch(tolower(m),

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    !
                    
                      
             "cox_pwexp"       = "PH piecewise-exponential",

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    !
                    
                      
             "ph_exponential"  = "PH exponential",

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    !
                    
                      
             "ph_weibull"      = "PH Weibull",

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    !
                    
                      
             "ph_gompertz"     = "PH Gompertz",

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    !
                    
                      
             "aft_lognormal"   = "AFT log-normal",

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    !
                    
                      
             "aft_weibull"     = "AFT Weibull",

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    !
                    
                      
             "aft_loglogistic" = "AFT log-logistic",

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    !
                    
                      
             m

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
   .flatten_params <- function(p) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    !
                    
                      
      if (is.null(p) || !length(p)) return(NA_character_)

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
      paste(sprintf("%s=%s", names(p), vapply(p, function(v){

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
         if (is.list(v)) return("[list]")

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
         if (is.numeric(v) && length(v) > 6) return(sprintf("[%.0f vals]", length(v)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    !
                    
                      
         paste(v, collapse = ",")

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    !
                    
                      
      }, character(1))), collapse = "; ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    !
                    
                      
   describe_covariates <- function(meta) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    !
                    
                      
      defs <- meta$covariates %||% list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!length(defs)) return(data.frame())

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    !
                    
                      
      do.call(rbind, lapply(defs, function(d) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    !
                    
                      
         data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    !
                    
                      
            name       = d$name %||% NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    !
                    
                      
            type       = d$type %||% NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    !
                    
                      
            dist       = d$dist %||% NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    !
                    
                      
            parameters = .flatten_params(d$params),

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    !
                    
                      
            transform  = if (length(d$transform)) paste(d$transform, collapse = " + ") else NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    !
                    
                      
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
         )

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
      }))

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    !
                    
                      
   describe_effects <- function(effects, data = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    !
                    
                      
      if (is.null(effects)) return(data.frame())

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    !
                    
                      
      rows <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    !
                    
                      
      rows[["(Intercept)"]] <- effects$intercept %||% 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    !
                    
                      
      rows[["treatment"]]   <- effects$treatment %||% 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
      # (A) named covariate coefficients

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(effects$covariates)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    !
                    
                      
         for (nm in names(effects$covariates)) rows[[nm]] <- effects$covariates[[nm]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
      # (B) formula + beta → model.matrix columns

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(effects$formula) && !is.null(effects$beta)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    !
                    
                      
         X0 <- if (!is.null(data)) data else data.frame()

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    !
                    
                      
         mm <- stats::model.matrix(stats::as.formula(effects$formula), data = X0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    !
                    
                      
         b  <- effects$beta

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    !
                    
                      
         if (length(b) != ncol(mm)) stop("effects$beta length mismatch with model.matrix columns")

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    !
                    
                      
         for (j in seq_along(b)) rows[[colnames(mm)[j]]] <- b[[j]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    !
                    
                      
      data.frame(term = names(rows), coefficient = unlist(rows), row.names = NULL, check.names = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    !
                    
                      
   describe_treatment <- function(meta) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    !
                    
                      
      tr <- meta$treatment %||% list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    !
                    
                      
      mode <- tr$assignment %||% NA_character_

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    !
                    
                      
      out <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    !
                    
                      
         assignment = mode,

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    !
                    
                      
         allocation = tr$allocation %||% NA_character_

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    !
                    
                      
      if (identical(mode, "stratified")) out$stratify_by <- paste(tr$stratify_by, collapse = ", ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    !
                    
                      
      if (identical(mode, "logistic_ps")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    !
                    
                      
         out$ps_formula <- if (!is.null(tr$ps_model$formula)) paste(deparse(tr$ps_model$formula), collapse = "") else NA_character_

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    !
                    
                      
         out$ps_beta    <- if (!is.null(tr$ps_model$beta)) paste(tr$ps_model$beta, collapse = ",") else NA_character_

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    !
                    
                      
      as.data.frame(out, check.names = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    !
                    
                      
   describe_censoring <- function(meta) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    !
                    
                      
      cz <- meta$censoring %||% list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    !
                    
                      
      data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    !
                    
                      
         mode        = cz$mode %||% NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    !
                    
                      
         target      = cz$target %||% NA_real_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    !
                    
                      
         admin_time  = cz$admin_time %||% NA_real_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    !
                    
                      
         stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
   # ---- main body ----

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    !
                    
                      
   d <- set$data

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    !
                    
                      
   m <- set$meta

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    !
                    
                      
   L <- m$tau %||% attr(d, "tau") %||% NA_real_   # shown as "L" in docs

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    !
                    
                      
   header <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    !
                    
                      
      n                  = NROW(d),

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    !
                    
                      
      L                  = L,

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    !
                    
                      
      model              = .pretty_model(m$model %||% NA_character_),

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    !
                    
                      
      event_rate         = mean(d$status == 1L, na.rm = TRUE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    !
                    
                      
      achieved_censoring = (m$achieved_censoring %||% mean(d$status == 0L, na.rm = TRUE)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    !
                    
                      
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    !
                    
                      
   baseline <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    !
                    
                      
      baseline = .flatten_params(m$baseline),

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    !
                    
                      
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    !
                    
                      
   covs_tbl <- describe_covariates(m)

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    !
                    
                      
   eff_tbl  <- describe_effects(m$effects %||% list(), data = d)

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    !
                    
                      
   tr_tbl   <- describe_treatment(m)

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    !
                    
                      
   cens_tbl <- describe_censoring(m)

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    !
                    
                      
   files <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    !
                    
                      
      csv   = m$files$csv   %||% NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    !
                    
                      
      rds   = m$files$rds   %||% NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    !
                    
                      
      rdata = m$files$rdata %||% NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    !
                    
                      
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    !
                    
                      
   list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    !
                    
                      
      header    = header,

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    !
                    
                      
      baseline  = baseline,

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    !
                    
                      
      effects   = eff_tbl,

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    !
                    
                      
      treatment = tr_tbl,

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    !
                    
                      
      censoring = cens_tbl,

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    !
                    
                      
      covariates = covs_tbl,

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    !
                    
                      
      files     = files

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      
   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# Power Calculation -------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @title Analyze Power for a Linear RMST Model via Simulation

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' @description Performs a power analysis for given sample sizes based on the direct

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'   linear regression model for RMST, using a bootstrap simulation approach.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @details

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' This function estimates power by generating a number of bootstrap

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' samples (`n_sim`) from the provided pilot data by resampling with replacement.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' For each bootstrap sample, it performs the following steps:

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' 1.  Estimates the censoring distribution using the Kaplan-Meier method (`survival::survfit`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' 2.  Calculates Inverse Probability of Censoring Weights (IPCW) for each observation.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' 3.  Fits a weighted linear model (`stats::lm`) to the RMST of the uncensored subjects.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' 4.  Extracts the p-value for the treatment `arm_var` coefficient.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' The final power for a given sample size is the proportion of the `n_sim` simulations

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' where this p-value is less than the significance level `alpha`. This simulation-based

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' approach is robust but can be computationally intensive.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @note `status_var` should be `1` for an event, `0` for censored. `arm_var`

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   should be `1` for treatment, `0` for control.

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @param pilot_data A `data.frame` with pilot study data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
