   Hc <- H0_step(df$Y_rmst) * exp(lp)

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    !
                    
                      
   Ghat <- exp(-Hc)

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
   # IPCW for all subjects (stabilize and cap heavy tails)

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    !
                    
                      
   eps <- 1e-6

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    !
                    
                      
   w <- 1 / pmax(Ghat, eps)

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    !
                    
                      
   w[!is.finite(w)] <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    !
                    
                      
   if (any(is.finite(w) & w > 0)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    !
                    
                      
      cap <- stats::quantile(w[is.finite(w) & w > 0], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    !
                    
                      
      w[w > cap] <- cap

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    !
                    
                      
   df$weights <- w

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
   # --- 3) Weighted RMST regression: Y_rmst ~ arm + covariates ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    !
                    
                      
   model_rhs <- paste(c(arm_var, linear_terms), collapse = " + ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
   model_formula <- stats::as.formula(paste("Y_rmst ~", model_rhs))

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    !
                    
                      
   fit_lm <- stats::lm(model_formula, data = df, weights = df$weights)

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
   beta_hat <- stats::coef(fit_lm)

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
   arm_coeff_name <- arm_var

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
   if (!(arm_coeff_name %in% names(beta_hat))) stop("Arm coefficient not found in model.", call. = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    !
                    
                      
   beta_effect <- beta_hat[arm_coeff_name]

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
   # --- 4) Sandwich variance: A = X' W X / n, B = X' diag((w r)^2) X / n ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    !
                    
                      
   X <- stats::model.matrix(model_formula, data = df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    !
                    
                      
   r <- df$Y_rmst - as.numeric(X %*% beta_hat)

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    !
                    
                      
   A_hat <- crossprod(X, X * df$weights) / n_pilot

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    !
                    
                      
   meat <- X * (df$weights * r)

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    !
                    
                      
   B_hat <- crossprod(meat) / n_pilot

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    !
                    
                      
   A_hat_inv <- solve(A_hat)

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    !
                    
                      
   V_hat_n <- A_hat_inv %*% B_hat %*% A_hat_inv

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    !
                    
                      
   var_beta_pilot <- V_hat_n[colnames(X) == arm_coeff_name, colnames(X) == arm_coeff_name] / n_pilot

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    !
                    
                      
   var_beta_n1 <- as.numeric(var_beta_pilot * n_pilot)

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    !
                    
                      
   se_beta_n1 <- sqrt(var_beta_n1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    !
                    
                      
   list(beta_effect = beta_effect, se_beta_n1 = se_beta_n1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
# Power Calculation -------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#' @title Analyze Power for RMST with Covariate-Dependent Censoring (Analytic)

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#' @description Analytic power for RMST regression when censoring depends on covariates

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#'   (single mechanism; no competing risks). Uses IPCW and a sandwich variance.

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams .estimate_dependent_censoring_params

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#' @param sample_sizes Numeric vector of per-arm sample sizes for power.

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
#' @param alpha Two-sided Type I error (default 0.05).

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A list: \code{results_data} (data.frame), \code{results_plot} (ggplot),

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#'   \code{results_summary} (data.frame with pilot effect).

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
DC.power.analytical.app <- function(pilot_data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
                                    time_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
                                    status_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
                                    arm_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
                                    dep_cens_status_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
                                    sample_sizes,

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
                                    linear_terms = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
                                    L,

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
                                    alpha = 0.05) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
   # 1) Estimate parameters from pilot data

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    !
                    
                      
   params <- .estimate_dependent_censoring_params(

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    !
                    
                      
      pilot_data, time_var, status_var, arm_var, dep_cens_status_var, linear_terms, L

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
   # 2) Power across N

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    !
                    
                      
   cat("--- Calculating power for specified sample sizes... ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    !
                    
                      
   z_alpha <- stats::qnorm(1 - alpha / 2)

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    !
                    
                      
   power_values <- sapply(sample_sizes, function(n_per_arm) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    !
                    
                      
      total_n <- n_per_arm * 2

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    !
                    
                      
      se_final <- params$se_beta_n1 / sqrt(total_n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    !
                    
                      
      stats::pnorm((abs(params$beta_effect) / se_final) - z_alpha)

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
   })

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    !
                    
                      
   results_df <- data.frame(N_per_Arm = sample_sizes, Power = power_values)

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
   # 3) Plot + return

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    !
                    
                      
   p <- ggplot2::ggplot(results_df, ggplot2::aes(x = N_per_Arm, y = Power)) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#0072B2", linewidth = 1) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#0072B2", size = 3) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::labs(

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    !
                    
                      
         title = "Analytic Power Curve: RMST with Covariate-Dependent Censoring (IPCW)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    !
                    
                      
         subtitle = "IPCW-based; single censoring mechanism.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    !
                    
                      
         x = "Sample Size Per Arm", y = "Estimated Power"

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
      ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::ylim(0, 1) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::theme_minimal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    !
                    
                      
   results_summary <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    !
                    
                      
      Statistic = "Assumed RMST Difference (from pilot)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    !
                    
                      
      Value = params$beta_effect

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    !
                    
                      
   list(results_data = results_df, results_plot = p, results_summary = results_summary)

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
# Sample Size Search ------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
#' @title Find Sample Size for RMST with Covariate-Dependent Censoring (Analytic)

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
#' @description Iterative per-arm N to reach target power using IPCW-based analytic variance.

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams .estimate_dependent_censoring_params

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
#' @param target_power Desired power.

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
#' @param alpha Two-sided Type I error (default 0.05).

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
#' @param n_start Starting per-arm N.

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
#' @param n_step Step size for search.

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
#' @param max_n_per_arm Maximum per-arm N to search.

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A list: \code{results_data}, \code{results_plot}, \code{results_summary}.

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
DC.ss.analytical.app <- function(pilot_data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
                                 time_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
                                 status_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
                                 arm_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
                                 dep_cens_status_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
                                 target_power,

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
                                 linear_terms = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
                                 L,

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
                                 alpha = 0.05,

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
                                 n_start = 50,

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
                                 n_step = 25,

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
                                 max_n_per_arm = 2000) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
   # 1) One-time estimation from pilot data

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    !
                    
                      
   params <- .estimate_dependent_censoring_params(

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    !
                    
                      
      pilot_data, time_var, status_var, arm_var, dep_cens_status_var, linear_terms, L

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      
   # 2) Iterative search

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    !
                    
                      
   cat("--- Searching for Sample Size (Method: Analytic) ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    !
                    
                      
   z_alpha <- stats::qnorm(1 - alpha / 2)

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    !
                    
                      
   current_n <- n_start

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    !
                    
                      
   search_path <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    !
                    
                      
   final_n <- NA_integer_

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    !
                    
                      
   while (current_n <= max_n_per_arm) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    !
                    
                      
      total_n <- 2 * current_n

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    !
                    
                      
      se_final <- params$se_beta_n1 / sqrt(total_n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    !
                    
                      
      calculated_power <- stats::pnorm((abs(params$beta_effect) / se_final) - z_alpha)

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!is.finite(calculated_power)) calculated_power <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    !
                    
                      
      search_path[[as.character(current_n)]] <- calculated_power

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    !
                    
                      
      cat(sprintf("  N = %d/arm, Calculated Power = %.3f\n", current_n, calculated_power))

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    !
                    
                      
      if (calculated_power >= target_power) { final_n <- current_n; break }

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    !
                    
                      
      current_n <- current_n + n_step

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    !
                    
                      
   if (is.na(final_n)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    !
                    
                      
      warning(paste("Target power", target_power, "not achieved by max N of", max_n_per_arm), call. = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    !
                    
                      
      final_n <- max_n_per_arm

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
   # 3) Finalize + return

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    !
                    
                      
   results_df <- data.frame(Target_Power = target_power, Required_N_per_Arm = final_n)

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    !
                    
                      
   search_path_df <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    !
                    
                      
      N_per_Arm = as.integer(names(search_path)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    !
                    
                      
      Power = as.numeric(unlist(search_path))

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      
   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    !
                    
                      
   p <- ggplot2::ggplot(na.omit(search_path_df), ggplot2::aes(x = N_per_Arm, y = Power)) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#009E73", linewidth = 1) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#009E73", size = 3) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = target_power, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = final_n, linetype = "dotted", color = "blue") +

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::labs(

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    !
                    
                      
         title = "Analytic Sample Size Search (RMST; Covariate-Dependent Censoring)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    !
                    
                      
         subtitle = "IPCW-based; single censoring mechanism.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    !
                    
                      
         x = "Sample Size Per Arm", y = "Calculated Power"

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
      ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::theme_minimal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    !
                    
                      
   cat("\n--- Calculation Summary ---\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    !
                    
                      
   print(knitr::kable(results_df, caption = "Required Sample Size"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    !
                    
                      
   results_summary <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    !
                    
                      
      Statistic = "Assumed RMST Difference (from pilot)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    !
                    
                      
      Value = params$beta_effect

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    !
                    
                      
   list(results_data = results_df, results_plot = p, results_summary = results_summary)

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Run Survival Diagnostics for Pilot Data

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#' @title Run Survival Diagnostics for Pilot Data

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description This function performs survival diagnostics on pilot data, including a log-rank test and Kaplan-Meier plot.

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' @param pilot_data A data frame containing the pilot data with survival information.

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' @param time_var A string specifying the name of the time variable in the pilot data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' @param status_var A string specifying the name of the status variable in the pilot data (1 for event, 0 for censored).

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @param arm_var A string specifying the name of the treatment arm variable in the pilot data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @param strata_var An optional string specifying the name of the stratification variable in the pilot data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param alpha The significance level for calculating the confidence interval (default is 0.05).

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
.run_survival_diagnostics <- function(pilot_data, time_var, status_var, arm_var, strata_var = NULL, alpha = 0.05) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    !
                    
                      
  df <- pilot_data

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    !
                    
                      
  df[[arm_var]] <- as.factor(df[[arm_var]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(strata_var)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    !
                    
                      
    df[[strata_var]] <- as.factor(df[[strata_var]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
  # --- 1. Perform Log-Rank Test ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    !
                    
                      
  logrank_summary <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    !
                    
                      
  p_value <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    !
                    
                      
  if (length(unique(df[[arm_var]])) >= 2) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    !
                    
                      
    surv_formula_logrank <- if (is.null(strata_var)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    !
                    
                      
      as.formula(paste("Surv(", time_var, ",", status_var, ") ~", arm_var))

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
    } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    !
                    
                      
      as.formula(paste("Surv(", time_var, ",", status_var, ") ~", arm_var, "+ strata(", strata_var, ")"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    !
                    
                      
    logrank_test <- survival::survdiff(surv_formula_logrank, data = df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    !
                    
                      
    p_value <- stats::pchisq(logrank_test$chisq, length(logrank_test$n) - 1, lower.tail = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
    

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    !
                    
                      
    logrank_summary <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    !
                    
                      
      Statistic = "Log-Rank Test Chi-Square", Value = round(logrank_test$chisq, 3)

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    !
                    
                      
    logrank_summary <- rbind(logrank_summary, data.frame(Statistic = "Degrees of Freedom", Value = length(logrank_test$n) - 1))

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    !
                    
                      
    logrank_summary <- rbind(logrank_summary, data.frame(Statistic = "P-Value", Value = scales::pvalue(p_value)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    !
                    
                      
    logrank_summary <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    !
                    
                      
      Statistic = "Log-Rank Test Status", Value = "Not Applicable (only one treatment arm present in data)"

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
  # --- 2. Generate Kaplan-Meier Plot ---

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    !
                    
                      
  surv_formula <- as.formula(paste("Surv(", time_var, ",", status_var, ") ~", arm_var))

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
  # Calculate fit using the specified alpha for the confidence level

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    !
                    
                      
  fit <- survival::survfit(surv_formula, data = df, conf.level = 1 - alpha)

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    !
                    
                      
  fit_fortified <- ggplot2::fortify(fit)

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
  # Updated plotting logic for clarity

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
  km_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(fit_fortified, ggplot2::aes(x = .data$time, y = .data$surv)) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
    # Add the confidence interval ribbon with a dedicated fill aesthetic

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = .data$lower, ymax = .data$upper, fill = .data$strata), alpha = 0.3) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
    # Add the survival curve with a dedicated color aesthetic

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_step(aes(color = .data$strata), linewidth = 1) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::labs(

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    !
                    
                      
      title = "Kaplan-Meier Curve by Treatment Arm",

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    !
                    
                      
      x = "Time", y = "Survival Probability", 

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    !
                    
                      
      color = "Arm", # Legend title for color (lines)

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    !
                    
                      
      fill = "Arm"   # Legend title for fill (ribbons)

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
    ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    !
                    
                      
    ggplot2::theme_minimal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(p_value) && is.null(strata_var)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    !
                    
                      
    km_plot <- km_plot + ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0, hjust = -0.1, vjust = -0.5, label = paste("Log-Rank p =", scales::pvalue(p_value)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
  # If a strata variable is present, create a faceted plot

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    !
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(strata_var)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    !
                    
                      
    km_plot <- km_plot + ggplot2::facet_wrap(as.formula(paste("~", strata_var))) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    !
                    
                      
      ggplot2::labs(title = "Kaplan-Meier Curves by Stratum and Treatment Arm")

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
  

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    !
                    
                      
  return(list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    !
                    
                      
    km_plot = km_plot,

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    !
                    
                      
    logrank_summary = logrank_summary

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
  ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Launch the RMSTdesign Shiny Application

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' A function to easily launch the interactive Shiny application bundled with

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' the package.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny runApp

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom bslib bs_themer

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom DT datatable renderDataTable

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom ggplot2 ggplot aes geom_line geom_point labs theme_light ylim

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom kableExtra kbl kable_styling

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom magrittr %>%

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom plotly ggplotly renderPlotly

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom rmarkdown render

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny reactive req showNotification renderUI tagList fluidRow

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny column selectInput selectizeInput radioButtons textInput

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny sliderInput wellPanel h4 numericInput observe observeEvent

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny updateSelectInput reactiveVal validate need withProgress

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny setProgress renderText downloadButton downloadHandler

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny removeNotification hr p bindCache bindEvent

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shinyjs toggle toggleState reset

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom stats as.formula complete.cases pchisq sd na.omit

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom survival survfit Surv survdiff

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom survminer ggsurvplot

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'   RMSTpowerBoost::run_app()

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
run_app <- function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    !
                    
                      
   library(RMSTpowerBoost)

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
   # Get the path to the Shiny app directory within the installed package

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    !
                    
                      
   app_dir <- system.file("shiny_app", package = "RMSTpowerBoost")

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
   # Check if the directory exists

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    !
                    
                      
   if (app_dir == "") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    !
                    
                      
      stop(

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    !
                    
                      
         "Could not find the app directory. ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    !
                    
                      
         "Try re-installing the `RMSTpowerBoost` package.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    !
                    
                      
         call. = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
   # Launch the app

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    !
                    
                      
   shiny::runApp(app_dir, display.mode = "normal")

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
}
